Legal

Privacy Policy

Structured draft only. Replace placeholders and confirm the real operational stack before publication.

Before publishing: add the real legal identity, privacy email, hosting provider, analytics provider, payment provider, retention periods, and transfer details.

1. Data controller

[EDITH legal identity], [registered address], [privacy email].

2. Data processed

Navigation data, contact form submissions, purchase and licensing data, and technical support data where applicable.

3. Purpose

Service delivery, license fulfillment, support, legal compliance, security, and optional analytics if activated.

4. Retention

Define concrete retention windows for each category instead of generic wording.

5. Rights

Access, rectification, deletion, restriction, objection, portability, and complaint rights should be described according to the applicable law.

EDITH Dev Studio

Publisher brand for Upscaler Studio and future premium Windows-first desktop software.
